== Notes for [[Item:Q103269|Q103269]] ==

On image 3 of http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45592 it says that Alvar Rodriguez de Maluenda was married to a Carrillo who was the daughter of Juan Carrillo, regidor of Burgos and senor de Hormaza, y de Isabel de Hinestrosa. Some sources claim that Juan Carrillo de Hormaza, had a first marriage with writer later turned nun Teresa de Cartagena.

Some genealogists claim that Juan Carrillo de Hormaza never married and didnt had any succession which seems to be untrue

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000081359912118

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
